additionalNotes.label: Additional Notes
additionalNotes.placeholder: Any additional information about the test, special instructions, or observations...

bulkEntry.completedDateDescription: Specify when these lab results were completed. This date is required for tracking trends over time.
bulkEntry.copyDescription: Copy and paste lab results from reports, PDFs, or other sources
bulkEntry.detectHeadersDesc: Skip first line if it contains header keywords
bulkEntry.detectUnitsDesc: Try to identify measurement units automatically
bulkEntry.dropPdf: Drop PDF here or click to select
bulkEntry.firstColumnName: Assume first column is test name
bulkEntry.firstColumnNameDesc: Treat first column as test name in tabular data

createFailedTryAgain: Failed to create lab result. Please try again.

display.noComponentsDescription: Test results will appear here once they are added to this lab result.

emptyLabResultMessage: You created a lab result but didn't add any test components. Would you like to delete this lab result?

form.componentCreationWarning: Lab result saved but test components could not be added. You can add them from the view page.
form.linkConditionsDescription: Associate this lab result with relevant medical conditions for better tracking and organization.
form.linkVisitsDescription: Associate this lab result with visits where it was ordered or reviewed.
form.relationshipCreationWarning: Lab result saved but some relationships could not be created. You can add them from the edit page.

labResultCreated: Lab result "{{testName}}" has been created. Now you can upload and parse your PDF.
loadingHint: If this takes too long, please refresh the page

messages.noRelationshipsAvailable: No medical conditions or visits on record. Add them first to link them here.
messages.relationshipsCreateInfo: Relationships can be added after saving the lab result.
messages.relationshipsSaveFirst: Save the lab result first to create relationship links.
messages.testComponentsEditInfo: Test components can be managed from the view page after saving.

networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
patientIdRequired: Patient ID is required. Please select a patient first.
quickFormInstructions: Enter a name for this lab result, then you'll be able to upload and parse your PDF.
quickImportSuccess: Lab result and test components imported successfully
startAdding: Start by adding your first lab result.

stats.basedOn_one: Based on {{count}} test with reference ranges
stats.basedOn_other: Based on {{count}} tests with reference ranges

stats.criticalAction: Action Required: {{count}} critical result detected. Please consult with healthcare provider immediately.
stats.criticalAction_one: Action Required: {{count}} critical result detected. Please consult with healthcare provider immediately.
stats.criticalAction_other: Action Required: {{count}} critical results detected. Please consult with healthcare provider immediately.
stats.noDataDescription: Statistics will appear once test components are added to this lab result.
stats.ofTestsHaveRanges: {{withRanges}} of {{total}} tests have reference ranges defined
stats.outOfRangeCount: {{count}} out of {{total}} tests are outside reference ranges
stats.outOfRangeCount_one: {{count}} out of {{total}} tests are outside reference ranges
stats.outOfRangeCount_other: {{count}} out of {{total}} tests are outside reference ranges
stats.resultsAttention: Several results require attention or follow-up.
stats.resultsGood: Majority of results are within normal ranges.

tabs.noComponentsDescription: Add test results using the templates or bulk entry tools below to track individual lab values and trends.

templates.customEntryInstructions: Enter your own test components. Fill in the test name, unit, value, and optional reference ranges. Click "Add Another Test" to add more rows as needed.
templates.noTemplatesDescription: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria
templates.templateInstructionsText: Enter the test values and reference ranges for each test below. Reference ranges should match what your lab provides. Leave tests blank if not performed.
templates.title: Test Templates

descriptions.linkedTest: Link this test to a standard test name for trend tracking across different lab naming variations

editModal.linkedInfo: This test will be grouped with other "{{testName}}" tests in trend charts.

placeholders.linkedTest: Select a standard test to link to...
placeholders.notes: Additional notes about this test result

emptyState.description: Templates provide common lab panels (CBC, CMP, etc.) where you can enter values and ranges. Bulk import allows you to copy/paste results from lab reports for automatic parsing.
